items.title: Save the Date: Princeton, LA and Palm Beach 2026
items.description: CorpGov, IPO Edge and PE Edge will be hosting the second Princeton CorpGov Forum on May 21, 2026, the second LA CorpGov Forum in the summer of 2026, and the sixth annual Palm Beach CorpGov Forum on November 4-5, 2026. We invite institutional investors, corporate executives, and Princeton alumni/students to attend these events. Registration is currently open for the second […] The post Save the Date: Princeton, LA and Palm Beach 2026 appeared first on CorpGov.

items.title: What The Latest Analyst Upgrades Mean For HELLENiQ ENERGY’s Story and Valuation
items.description: Analysts have recently raised their fair value estimate for HELLENiQ ENERGY Holdings from €8.16 to €8.48, signaling a measured boost in confidence. At the same time, the discount rate has dropped notably from 12.30% to 10.82%, which points to a perception of greater stability and reduced risk in the company’s outlook. As sentiment shifts across the financial community, readers will want to follow ongoing updates to understand how changing analyst perspectives may impact the stock going...

items.title: ING to acquire remaining 55% stake in Goldman Sachs TFI
items.description: The bank already owns a 45% stake in the company and will now take full control of the Polish asset management business.

items.title: Look for companies beyond buzzy tech stocks and speculative names, Jim Cramer says
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer on Wednesday encouraged investors to choose stocks that aren't necessarily trendy.

items.title: Coinbase Hires Former Goldman Sachs Partner To Manage Key Pillars Of 'Everything Exchange' Strategy
items.description: Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) has hired former Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) Partner Liz Martin as it looks to expand beyond cryptocurrency trading. Martin is joining Coinbase as vice president of product, overseeing its markets and derivatives divisions, the exchange said in a statement to Benzinga on Thursday. “She will lead Coinbase’s exchanges, drive the next phase of growth for the company’s derivatives business, and manage its global markets team – all key pillars of Coinbase’s ‘Everything Exchange’ st
